text.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: ((اللَّهُمَّ فَأَيُّمَا مُؤْمِنٍ سَبَبْتُهُ فَاجْعَلْ ذَلِكَ لَهُ قُرْبَةً إِلَيْكَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ)).
text.arabicTranslated: (Allahumma fa-ayyuma mu/minin sababtuhu fajAAal thalika lahu qurbatan ilayka yawmal-qiyamah.)
text.translated: (O Allah, to any believer whom I have insulted, let that be cause to draw him near to You on the Day of Resurrection.)

title: Invocation for someone you have spoken ill to
